name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ state[turn] = idle
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = critical]
        \/ /\ state[turn] = critical
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = idle]
          /\ turn' = IF turn = N THEN 1 ELSE turn + 1
        \/ /\ state' = state
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

TypeOK == /\ participants \in FiniteSet
          /\ votes \in FiniteSet
          /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "Pending"}

Init == /\ participants = {}
        /\ votes = {}
        /\ decision = "Pending"

Prepare == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes = {}

VoteYes == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes' = Append(votes, "Yes")

VoteNo == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes' = Append(votes, "No")

Commit == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes = [x \in participants |-> "Yes"]
          /\ decision' = "Commit"

Abort == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes = [x \in participants |-> "No"]
          /\ decision' = "Abort"

Next == \/ Prepare
        \/ VoteYes
        \/ VoteNo
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; 0 means free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N) + 1] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(1..N))]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
    \/ /\ count < K
        /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
    \/ /\ count > 0
        /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)
State == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* TypeOK ensures all variables have the correct type *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {"None"} \/ State
          /\ state \in State

(* Initial state: all servers start as Followers with term 0 and no vote *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = "None"
        /\ state = "Follower"

(* Transition to Candidate: increment term, vote for self, become Candidate *)
BecomeCandidate == /\ state' = "Candidate"
                  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
                  /\ votedFor' = "Self"

(* Transition to Leader: become Leader *)
BecomeLeader == /\ state' = "Leader"

(* Transition to Follower: reset term and votedFor *)
BecomeFollower == /\ state' = "Follower"
                  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
                  /\ votedFor' = "None"

(* Next-state relation: either become Candidate, Leader, or Follower *)
Next == \/ BecomeCandidate
        \/ BecomeLeader
        \/ BecomeFollower

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
